subject: [PATCH v3] iommu/arm-smmu-v3: Shrink command/event/PRI queues in kdump kernel

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch author posted a follow-up reply to their own patch, but it was just a gentle ping with no new content.

2026-07-15.patch_summary: This patch shrinks the command, event, and PRI queues in the kdump kernel to a single page when is_kdump_kernel() is true. The current implementation allocates these queues at their maximum size advertised by the hardware, which can be several megabytes each. This change reduces memory usage in the capture kernel, which runs from a small crashkernel reservation.
